positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for space_vampire_pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    is_a(space,vacuum)).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    sucks(vampire)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~sucks(duster)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    is_a(duster,household_appliance)).

cnf(u16,negated_conjecture,
    ~is_a(space,vampire)).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    sucks(vacuum)).

cnf(u10,axiom,
    sucks(plunger)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
